channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'We have no reason to believe that our data or systems have been compromised': US lawmakers said 2.5 million VRChat users were at risk from a hack, but the company says it's a fake notice
item.description: A government breach notice claimed VRChat data exposure affecting millions, but the company strongly denies any compromise or system intrusion.

item.title: AI is hurting Apple in more ways than one: it may force iPhone price increases
item.description: CEO Tim Cook said in a recent interview that the situation is "unsustainable."

item.title: How to watch Uzbekistan vs Colombia: Free Streams & TV Channels for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Uzbekistan vs Colombia for free online and from anywhere as the World Cup 2026 debutants face Los Cafeteros in Mexico City.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Thursday, June 18 (game #1103)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Thursday, June 18 (game #1606)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Thursday, June 18 (game #837)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: The Korean Telecom Giant at the Center of Anthropic’s Mythos Controversy
item.description: Days before Anthropic took its most advanced AI models offline, the White House ordered the company to revoke SK Telecom’s access to Claude Mythos over claims of alleged ties to China.

item.title: Tim Cook says Apple price increases are 'unavoidable' due to memory crunch
"The father of them all' — How Europe's top-secret Barracuda drone shaped the future of combat aviation 20 years ago
item.description: Twenty years after its first flight, Barracuda remains the technological foundation behind Europe's future military aviation projects.

item.title: AWS enters the context layer race with a graph that learns from agents, not manual curation
item.description: Building a context layer between enterprise data stores and AI agents is bespoke work, with no standard service to automate or maintain the graphs over time. Amazon is making a direct play to change that.Amazon on Wednesday entered the space, announcing a series of three products it's positioning as a context intelligence stack for AI agents. The centerpiece is AWS Context, a new knowledge graph service that gets smarter through agent usage over time. AWS also announced the general availability of Amazon S3 Annotations and a preview of skill assets in AWS Glue Data Catalog.The context layer is...

item.title: How to watch Mexico vs South Korea: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as co-hosts continue FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign
item.description: Here's how to watch Mexico vs South Korea for free online and from anywhere in Group A of the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: Quote of the day by Netflix co-founder Reed Hastings: 'Stone Age. Bronze Age. Iron Age. We define entire epics of humanity by the technology they use' — defining a new era for humankind
item.description: Netflix has become a titan in the content delivery landscape, and its co-founder believes humanity is on the verge of entering a new era

item.title: Inventory, invoices, reports, and cash flow — QuickBooks Premier is on sale for $399.99
item.description: Get Intuit QuickBooks Desktop Premier 2024 for Windows for $399.99 (reg. $625) and manage inventory, reporting, invoices, and business finances from one platform.

item.title: Tim Cook says RAM expenses are ‘unsustainable’ and Apple is going to raise prices
item.description: Apple is planning to raise prices in response to the ongoing memory shortage. In an interview with The Wall Street Journal, Apple CEO Tim Cook says "price increases are unavoidable:" We're doing our best to mitigate the huge increases that are being passed to us, and we've been trying to shield our customers from the […]
